title: Brave Create World
description: This mod pack has a focus on Create and Farmers Delight. There are a handful of performance and decoration mods, as well as Immersive Aircraft / Ships. It was named after the book "A Brave New World".
body:
This modpack was developed between friends to play a Create heavy world. The purpose of the mod pack is to blend together Create and Farmers delight mods to increase the creativity of factories that can be produced. There are added design mods, such as Create Deco and Chipped, as well as a few performance mods to help with lag, such as Clumps and Entity Culling. The modpack will be maintained for performance as there are many who play on laptops or with low RAM.  

Mods included by not limited to:

Create
Farmer's Delight
Comforts
Gravestone
Xaero's Minimap
Sophisticated Backpacks
Copycat
Waystones

Performance mods included but not limited to:

Entity Culling
Lithium
Modern Fix
Better F3
Clumps
JEI


For a full list of the mods, please review the pack here, or on the Modrinth app. The purpose of publishing this is to the modpack can be maintained for performance so a static list on this page might not have the most up to date information.
